context.description: Add all new backend dependencies and environment configuration for Stripe, Celery, Lob, and email services. Foundation for all service implementations.
acceptance_criteria: backend/requirements.txt includes: stripe>=7.0.0, celery[redis]>=5.3.0, lob-python>=6.0.0, sendgrid>=6.9.0

backend/core/config.py DevelopmentSettings adds: STRIPE_SECRET_KEY, STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET, STRIPE_PRICE_ID_PER_LETTER, LOB_API_KEY, CELERY_BROKER_URL (default redis://localhost:6379/1), CELERY_RESULT_BACKEND (default redis://localhost:6379/2), SENDGRID_API_KEY, FROM_EMAIL
backend/.env.example updated with all new variables (values as placeholder strings)
All new config fields have sensible defaults or clear error if missing
Verify with: python -c 'from core.config import settings; print(settings.STRIPE_SECRET_KEY)'
implementation_approach: Step 1: Read backend/core/config.py to understand existing DevelopmentSettings pattern
Step 2: Add new dependencies to requirements.txt following existing version pin style
Step 3: Add new settings fields to DevelopmentSettings class with Optional typing where appropriate
Step 4: Create or update .env.example with all new variables
Step 5: Verify no circular imports by checking import order in config.py
pre_analysis: Read backend/core/config.py for existing settings class structure and env var patterns
Read backend/requirements.txt for existing dependency format
